system.effect: This highly flexible mechadendrite extends to roughly three metres and can reduce its width to pencil thickness. It grants +10 to Perception Tests and +20 to vision-based Tests in darkness, can inspect surfaces at a microscopic level, and can function as a telescopic sight. It also includes normal and infrared illumination.
system.drawbacks: Requires the relevant Mechadendrite Use talent and Cyber-Mantle. A character may not have more mechadendrites than his Toughness Bonus.

description.value: An optical sensor array mechadendrite with pict-capture and precision inspection capability.

system.notes: Requires relevant Mechadendrite Use talent and Cyber-Mantle.
